lessons.key: ac_gap::assert distinct redis host env vars or live pings for cache vs queue from the app container not only compose yaml
lessons.text: Assert distinct Redis host env vars (or live pings) for cache vs queue from the app container, not only Compose YAML

lessons.key: ac_gap::when stop grace period or aof durability is specified add a sigterm or restart assertion that proves the queue store survives
lessons.text: When stop_grace_period or AOF durability is specified, add a SIGTERM or restart assertion that proves the queue store survives

lessons.key: ac_gap::when healthchecks are a requirement fault inject an upstream failure and assert docker compose ps reports unhealthy
lessons.text: When healthchecks are a requirement, fault-inject an upstream failure and assert docker compose ps reports unhealthy

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::compose profile done when checks must be scripts invoked by make test not only manual docker compose config
lessons.text: Compose profile Done-when checks must be scripts invoked by make test, not only manual docker compose config

lessons.key: surviving_mutant::assert compose stop grace period from rendered config or stop without t do not hardcode docker stop t in the grace period test
lessons.text: Assert Compose stop_grace_period from rendered config (or stop without -t); do not hardcode docker stop -t in the grace-period test

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::run validate env against env example inside the full gate when the ac requires complete bootstrap env vars
lessons.text: Run validate-env against .env.example inside the Full gate when the AC requires complete bootstrap env vars

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::parse compose config json for depends on service healthy conditions instead of relying on static file review alone
lessons.text: Parse compose config JSON for depends_on service_healthy conditions instead of relying on static file review alone

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::either execute a multiarch buildx dry run in ci gate or explicitly document script only evidence as accepted for the multiarch ac
lessons.text: Either execute a multiarch buildx dry-run in CI/gate or explicitly document script-only evidence as accepted for the multiarch AC

lessons.key: spec_deviation::when laravel symfony majors break stable phpmd pin phpmd 3 x dev with a spec deviation and adapt the cli to analyze format ruleset flags rather than inventing a substitute smell tool
lessons.text: When Laravel/Symfony majors break stable PHPMD, pin phpmd 3.x-dev with a SPEC_DEVIATION and adapt the CLI to analyze/format/ruleset flags rather than inventing a substitute smell tool

lessons.key: spec_deviation::for phpstan 2 x drop obsolete neon params removed upstream and scope pest feature testcall ignoreerrors to tests instead of disabling strict analysis globally
lessons.text: For PHPStan 2.x, drop obsolete neon params removed upstream and scope Pest Feature TestCall ignoreErrors to tests/* instead of disabling strict analysis globally

lessons.key: ac_gap::add an automated smoke that asserts fake link testing exists when postgres init runs infra only scripts are not verified by green unit tests alone
lessons.text: Add an automated smoke that asserts fake_link_testing exists when Postgres init runs; infra-only scripts are not verified by green unit tests alone

lessons.key: ac_gap::assert migration schema contracts in integration tests via information schema or pg catalog not only by reading migration source files
lessons.text: Assert migration schema contracts in integration tests via information_schema or pg_catalog, not only by reading migration source files

lessons.key: ac_gap::boot tests must assert serviceprovider registration by resolving a module port from the container not only that the application starts
lessons.text: Boot tests must assert ServiceProvider registration by resolving a module port from the container, not only that the application starts

lessons.key: spec_precision_gap::hashing tests must assert published config defaults from config files not only override config in test beforeeach
lessons.text: Hashing tests must assert published config defaults from config files, not only override config in test beforeEach

lessons.key: ac_gap::integration tests must cover not null and check constraint failures for required persistence fields listed as spec edge cases
lessons.text: Integration tests must cover NOT NULL and CHECK constraint failures for required persistence fields listed as spec edge cases
